## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.

Closes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 CI / Config
- [ ] 🧪 Test

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `forge fmt --check`
- [ ] I have run `forge test -vvv` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run `forge coverage --report summary` and coverage is not reduced
- [ ] I have run `slither . --config slither.config.json` (no new issues)
- [ ] My changes generate no new compiler warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
